mapper.insert: INSERT INTO R_ACTIVITY_LOG_T (HISTORY_ID, USER_ID, ACTION_TYPE, TARGET_TYPE, TARGET_ID, TARGET_NAME, PAGE_CODE, REQUEST_METHOD, REQUEST_URI, IP_ADDRESS, DETAIL) VALUES (#{HISTORY_ID}, #{USER_ID}, #{ACTION_TYPE}, #{TARGET_TYPE}, #{TARGET_ID}, #{TARGET_NAME}, #{PAGE_CODE}, #{REQUEST_METHOD}, #{REQUEST_URI}, #{IP_ADDRESS}, #{DETAIL})
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, u.NAME AS USER_NAME FROM R_ACTIVITY_LOG_T a LEFT JOIN R_USER_T u ON a.USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE a.TARGET_ID = #{deviceId} AND a.TARGET_TYPE IN ('DEVICE', 'DEVICE_SNMP', 'DEVICE_SCOPE', 'DEVICE_SSH', 'PORT') AND a.ACTION_TYPE IN ('CREATE', 'UPDATE', 'DELETE') ORDER BY a.CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM R_ACTIVITY_LOG_T WHERE TARGET_ID = #{deviceId} AND TARGET_TYPE IN ('DEVICE', 'DEVICE_SNMP', 'DEVICE_SCOPE', 'DEVICE_SSH', 'PORT') AND ACTION_TYPE IN ('CREATE', 'UPDATE', 'DELETE')
